0.q: Earlier, we identified AlRabring7, an E3-Ub-ligase enzyme of the ubiquitination cascade, as an interacting partner of AlRab7 and showed in planta interaction between the two proteins.
A novel Rab7 interacting partner AlRabring7 was identified by yeast two-hybrid screening.

2.q: The maintained or increased superoxide dismutase, catalase, ascorbate peroxidase, guaiacol peroxidase, and glutathione reductase antioxidative enzyme activities suggest that an extensive ROS scavenging system was triggered to detoxify cellular ROS, which remained at low levels in transgenics.

3.q: AlHKT2;1 plays an important role in the K+ uptake during salt stress and in maintaining a high K+/Na+ ratio in the cytosol.
